author: Uzair K.
pros: - Amazing customer support - smooth UI - functional software, covers all use cases
cons: - Hardly anything, there are no cons that come to mind

description: Really like the system overall and feel that it is really useful for keeping up to date. I also like how everything is under the same platform so only have to use one log -in.
author: Laura W.
pros: I like the appearance of the system and that it is similar to a social media profile with a news feed and notifications. I really like how easy it is to keep up with internal communications from around the business and that you get a notification email for new content.
cons: The performance review section could be easier to use from an employee point of view - its not always clear where you need to respond/save comments.

description: Its ok, used better platforms that are easier to navigate especially for those that are neurodiverse
author: Chanelle W.
pros: Looks nice, buttons are easy to click on.
cons: Don't like the way overtime is logged, gets confusing and also doesn't show you in monetary value.

author: Ronald M.
pros: We started using StaffCircle with a view to it managing OKR,s. However it became clear that the value in this software for me was in the Hr and Communication sections. We use this Daily for holiday management, storing employee details. The most important feature for me is being able to push articles out to either our whole team or targeted groups, across multiple platforms. Our customer success manager has been fantastic. And is always available when we were ready to start implementing new features.
cons: At times particularly at the implementation stage the layout wasn't as intuitive as it could be. This tends not to be in the sections that employees use but more in the sections that you use les often. This gets better the more you use it and find your way around.

review_title: Great platform but you have to be willing to invest time learning how to use it effectively
description: Overall my experience has been positive. I would recommend the product but with the advise that you must be willing to invest time in it.
author: Dawn H.
pros: The reviews and objectives features are the one we use primarily - they have really helped to promote a culture of feedback in the business. The fact that all users have visibility on their progress and goals is essential for the generations we have working for us. The implementation process was managed really well. We needed the platform introduced quickly and the Staff Circle team really did deliver. From set up to training I felt supported and was never made to feel a nuisance with any question I had.
cons: As the main admin user I have invested time in understanding how to get the best from the platform and I would advise any future users to ensure they, their managers and end users all to do the same. If you invest this time you will get the best from it but due to the fact it is not entirely intuitive, users could get frustrated by some of the functionality. I would really like to see the option to set up an API available - I would love to have my employees automatically transfer to Staff Circle from our HR & Payroll system as this manual process can be time consuming. I would like more contact with my customer relationship manager.

description: My experience so far has been very positive. I have not yet done a full round of the annual reviews but we have our mid-year ones and they were good. The support has been good and i'm interested to se how my company will continue to use this and develop it.
author: Emilie S.
pros: Its a good place for all HR information to be centralized. The bets features are the time off management, performance review process and the options to post on a wall like you would on social media accounts.
cons: We use this a lot to get information out on directly non-work related things. Such as events, info etc. Sometimes we only get maybe 50% interaction form the company - Would be good if maybe on the email that gets sent round notifying people of a post, it gives them a preview to entice them clicking on to the link, rather than just name of post.

description: VERY HELPFULL AND ENLIGHTINGING, GREAT TOOL FOR ALL BUSINESSES, BIG OR SMALL.
author: Wesley S.
pros: IT HELPS ALL EMPLOYEES TO VIEW AND COMMUNICATE WITH ALL BRANCHES OF THE COMPANY IN A SAFE AND VIEWED INVIROMENT.
cons: CANT FAULT IT MUCH AT THIS POINT, EXCITED TO USE MORE AND GET MORE FAMILIER WITH THE PROGRAM.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lewis H.
pros: Employee Awards Asset Management Communication Feeds
cons: Not being able to automate things without using a 3rd party software which costs a lot of money is an issue.

review_title: Works very well for our business and suits our needs
description: Using StaffCircle has been one of my better experiencing with using an online HR system. I would certainly recommend the use of this system, it is very simple to use, yet has everything we need for out businesses needs.
author: Ellie T.
pros: Easy to navigate between pages Can move between looking at my profile and the profiles I manage with ease SMART goals are trackable and have features that make it quick to update Space to upload documents that need sharing Booking annual leave is simple Approving annual leave is also simple, as you can see clearly who already has time off one each day, meaning that you won't accidentally overlap holiday Notification when a change/request has been made, meaning you don't need to log on to check for updates
cons: No issues so far and having been using this for over 6 months.

review_title: User friendly and easy to navigate
description: Very positive. StaffCircle is easy to use and very user friendly.
author: Melissa O.
pros: I like that StaffCircle feels very user friendly. Viewing company news is very similar to using some forms of social media making it engaging and easy to use. It's also really helpful that you can see if your holiday requests overlap with another team member. I like that you can connect channels such as our payslip portal which makes it really easy to find important information in one place.
cons: It would be good if it was possible to see the holiday of all staff at the same time. As I work with lots of teams across the company it would be good to use StaffCircle to see who is on leave quickly before setting up meetings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Katie D.
pros: I liked the fact its user friendly. A lot of senior staff would not be very good with technology and when they use staff circle they find it very easy to use.
cons: there is no mobile app for staff members to download. This means people without a laptop at home struggle to use this outside of work
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Staff Circle is a great Performance Tool
description: I cannot fault the service we have had with Staff Circle. Their implementation and oboarding is amazing! We are now moved over to the customer success team. You feel listened to and they have helped us every step of the way.
author: Samantha R.
pros: The Performance Management and Culture/Comms are great functions within Staff Circle. Our previous software was clunky. We had to use more than one tool to capture what we needed as a business
cons: In some areas there are need for improvement but I like that Staff Circle are open to feedback and the platform is continuously improving!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've had a very positive experience with staff circle so far and I look forward to using it more in the future.
author: Eleanor C.
pros: I like how easy staff circle is to use. It's very engaging and I like the notifications when a new post is uploaded. I would recommend staff circle.
cons: I don't like how hard it is to find how to book holiday in the next financial year.

author: Rebecca F.
pros: The level of engagement with our staff has been the highest we have ever seen since now we use Staff Circle. It is easy to use for all and everything is all in one place! I would highly recommend this platform.
cons: Would be great to see a personal page where you could share personal photos or updates with your colleagues (such as birthday pics etc)

author: stephen S.
pros: The ease of use is the main reason I like to use it.
cons: I would prefer if there was an option to update holiday requests once made.

description: I love Staff Circle, it has improved internal comms in my workplace immensely.
author: Carys M.
pros: I like how interactive Staff Circle is, it is like a social media platform but for work! Makes me feel connected to colleagues. I feel like a I have a voice.
cons: A lot of sections and tabs, can feel slightly overwhelming.

author: Sarah R.
pros: I find having leave and appraisals in one platform a great time saver.
cons: It took a few times of logging in to get used to but find once it becomes familiar.

description: Generally a great experience with useful comms and support when required.
author: Hanna S.
pros: Attention to detail and customer service.
cons: I can't always alter items on my own, sometimes updates impact my profiles functionality.

description: Very Good, although not fully reimplemented as yet
author: Kim Maidie D.
pros: It si reasonable easy to use; the support is always excellent - once a ticket is raised it is dealt with all the way thorough and followed up.
cons: Some things are not so great to report on

author: David B.
pros: Easy to access and use particularly when allocating time off
cons: nothing it adequately work for me and other staff members

description: Staff Circle is an easy platform to use to track employees
author: Rebecca C.
pros: Very easy to use and track progress on individuals in your team
cons: Can't scroll through employees without going into individuals rather than teams

description: The customer support and implementation has been amazing, a well thought out and user friendly experience, nothing is too much trouble! Very impressed - a lot of software companies can take guidance from Staff Circle on implementation and customer experience.
author: Cheryl S.
pros: A digital format where we can keep track of the basic HR functions in the business, but also communicate with the team and improve our performance management.
cons: So far I love it all! There is nothing we don't like!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Grace M.
pros: Staff circle is easy to use and accessible by everyone in the business. It allows for internal interaction, performance reviews and internal communications. With the internal communications, I like the features of being able to interact with posts made. I also like that it can be accessed from my mobile device, so i dont have to go onto my work laptop to access all info i require.
cons: Some features such as booking holiday/ amending holiday can be harder to work with.

description: Really loving the platform has ticked every box and more, initially set out looking for the ability to communicate with our remote staff, have since incorporated the ability to complete surveys and performance appraisals which has enabled us to consolidate 2 systems into 1 which has made it considerably easier to track and manage.
author: Andy W.
pros: Easy to use, we have a number of employees who are not particularly “tech savvy” so having a simple system was crucial for us – the user interface was the driver in us onboarding Staffcircle
cons: Nothing major to note, with the continuous release of new features it can take some time as admin to master these, however they do provide weekly training webinars for customers which prove invaluable

description: My experience with StaffCircle has so far been very awesome. It is also very easy to navigate the various section of the StaffCircle site.
author: CHUKWUDI E.
pros: StaffCircle makes it incredible easy for one to track and keep tab with agreed performance contract. One can easily access how far one has gone in terms of all the contracted goals in any given year.
cons: It is not accessible on the go. It should be made available through a mobile app. So one can use it anytime and anywhere.
